name: Set up Woolworths MarketPlus Shipping
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Woolworths MarketPlus lets you charge for shipping in a number of different ways, using rates in Neto by Maropost, on Woolworths MarketPlus, or even a mix. It\u2019s best to have an idea of how you will charge for shipping before you set up the integration so that you can prepare any custom fields and their data accordingly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are three primary ways to set up shipping:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use rate tables in Woolworths MarketPlus."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use a flat rate on each product in Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use a Neto shipping option to calculate postage costs."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These methods can be used in any combination, but will require more custom fields and data entered if you mix and match them. Follow one of the guides below to set use the same method for every product on Woolworths MarketPlus:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Free Shipping"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Flat Rate Shipping"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Neto Shipping Rates"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Woolworths MarketPlus Shipping Tables"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Setting Reference"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Free Shipping"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Free shipping requires no custom fields or data entry in Neto or on Woolworths MarketPlus.
